PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?country(COUNT(?medal) AS ?total) WHERE {
  wd:Q9678 wdt:P179 ?event .
  ?event wdt:P166 ?medal .
  ?medal wdt:P31 wd:Q99466 .
  ?medal wdt:P710 ?athlete .
  ?athlete wdt:P27 ?country .
}
GROUP BY ?country
ORDER BY DESC(?total)
LIMIT 1
